_publications._publicationTitle: Small Extracellular Vesicles Derived from NF2-Associated Schwannoma Cells Modulate Tumor Progression and Immunity via HSP90.

_contextSnippet: significantly enhanced their proliferation in vitro compared to the control group without NF2-EVs
details: Successfully measured enhanced proliferation of NF2-associated schwannoma cells treated with NF2-EVs compared to control group
